pulseOnFull.Name: pulseOnFull
pulseOnFull.Description: Play a pulse animation when all goals are reached or surpassed

showMarkers.Name: showMarkers
showMarkers.Description: Show markers for where each goal is on the bar

useForMoney.Name: useForMoney
useForMoney.Description: Track total donated for goal progress instead of points, if true
